title: Split MessageUpdateInput: id -> param, rename to MessagePatch, derive Default
description:
Current: message_set_update(&session, &MessageUpdateInput { id, body, reaction_changes: &[], ... })
After: message_update(&session, id, &MessagePatch { body: Some('edit'), ..Default::default() })

Also: reaction_changes field type changes to Vec<ReactionChange> or Option<&[ReactionChange]> so Default::default() gives 'no reactions'. Currently callers must write reaction_changes: &[] even when not using it.
